===Pokémon Black 2 and White 2 Animated Trailer===
Hugh appeared in the [[Pokémon Black Version 2 and Pokémon White Version 2 Animated Trailer]]. He was first seen running with {{ga|Nate}} to go meet [[Bianca]] in [[Aspertia City]]. Later, he was seen battling [[Team Plasma]] aboard the [[Plasma Frigate]] alongside Nate and [[Cheren]].
